name: Symptoms from asbestos at work showed up years later in Murray—too late?
description: No, claim when disabled; latency allowed under ODA.[4]

mainEntity.name: Symptoms from asbestos at work showed up years later in Murray—too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, claim when disabled; latency allowed under ODA.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, latency is common for occupational diseases; file when diagnosed if linked to past exposure.[4] Utah ODA ties claims to disability onset, not exposure date.[1][4] Key factors: continuous employment proof, medical causation despite delay, within 1-year filing post-diagnosis. Document job history thoroughly, get retroactive tests; courts accept delayed manifestations. File now to avoid bars.
